version_pin_rationale: libxkbcommon 1.4.0 is the jammy release build (no security-pocket bump as of 2026-06). Hyprland 0.50 needs >= 1.0; jammy's 1.4 is comfortable headroom. NOTE: libxkbcommon at runtime loads /usr/share/X11/xkb/ rules; the `xkb-data` package (not in this catalog tier) is required for keyboard layout resolution. DE-H1 will need to either add xkb-data as a separate catalog entry or rely on the jammy host shipping it (matches DE0-D's PAM-modules convention).
